title: Egyptian printed social-insurance document extraction (four logical groups)
description: Covers two sub-types issued by NOSI / صندوق العاملين: (1) social-insurance inquiry استعلام بيانات مؤمن عليه, (2) periodic-payroll slip بيانات الصرف الدوري. Fields that belong to the other sub-type are null.

document_header.description: Document-level metadata: type, issuing body, template codes, office hierarchy, print timestamp, reference number.

document_title_ar.description: Full Arabic title printed at the top of the document.

issuing_authority_ar.description: Full name of the issuing body, e.g. الهيكلة القومية للتأمين الاجتماعي / صندوق العاملين بقطاعي الأعمال العام والخاص.

template_code.description: Machine template identifier printed top-left, e.g. INDNO050/INDNS08 or BENINPBO/BEINSBO.

print_datetime.description: Timestamp printed top-right of the document, e.g. 2033/02/05 10:43:05.

office_name.description: مكتب name, e.g. شبين الكوم خان.

unit.description: وحدة — appears on payroll slips only; null for inquiry documents.

reference_number.description: Stamped or printed reference number on the document, e.g. 45838722/IB91.

ids.description: All national ID and insurance numbers on the document.

national_id.description: الرقم القومي of the primary person (insured person for inquiry; pension holder for payroll). 14 digits.

insurance_number.description: الرقم التأميني of the primary person (inquiry) or رقم تأميني صاحب المعاش (payroll).

paying_agent_insurance_number.description: رقم تأميني القائم بالصرف — payroll slips only; null for inquiry.

paying_agent_national_id.description: رقم قومي القائم بالصرف — payroll slips only; null for inquiry.

personal.description: Demographics of the primary person named on the document (insured person or pension holder). The paying agent's name lives inside payroll.paying_agent.

full_name_triple.description: الاسم ثلاثي — three-part given name of the primary person.

family_name.description: اسم العائلة — family/surname. Present on inquiry forms; may be null on payroll slips.

gender.description: النوع — gender as printed: ذكر or أنثى (or the code 1/2).

district_name.description: قسم / مركز name, e.g. مركز شبين الكوم.

sector_law.description: قانون / قطاع — often blank; null when not printed.

social_insurance.description: Fields specific to استعلام بيانات مؤمن عليه inquiry documents. Set to null for payroll slips.

insurance_status.description: Normalised insurance status extracted from the ** section: مؤمن عليه حاليا | غير مؤمن عليه حاليا | لا توجد بيانات تأمينية.

insurance_status_note.description: Full text of the ** status note as printed, e.g. لا توجد بيانات تأمينية لهذا الشخص.

main_center_address.description: المركز الرئيسي address, e.g. 3 ش الألفي - القاهرة.

payroll.description: Fields specific to بيانات الصرف الدوري payroll/pension slip documents. Set to null for inquiry documents.

pension_sector.description: قطاع المعاش — sector that the pension belongs to.

follow_up_office.description: منطقة / مكتب المتابعة — follow-up region and office.

payment_start_date.description: بداية الصرف الدوري — date from which periodic payment starts, e.g. 1-2-21.

disbursement_bank.description: جهة الصرف — bank or location where payment is disbursed.

current_account_number.description: رقم الحساب الجاري — bank account number.

total_entitlement.description: إجمالي الاستحقاق — total gross entitlement as printed, e.g. 1319 جنيه 76.

total_deductions.description: إجمالي الاستقطاع — total deductions as printed.

net_pension.description: صافي المعاش — net pension after deductions as printed, e.g. 1917 جنيه.

paying_agent.description: القائم بالصرف — the person authorised to collect the pension on behalf of the holder.

name.description: Full name of the paying agent as printed alongside their insurance number.

form_codes.description: Navigation / form codes printed at the bottom, e.g. PF06, PF10, PF03.

uncertain_fields.description: Dot-path names of fields the model could not read confidently.
